title: sorbus alnifolia f. macrophylla
intro: Sorbus alnifolia f. macrophylla, also known as the Korean whitebeam, is a variety of the Korean mountain ash tree, characterized by its broad and ovate leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Sorbus alnifolia f. macrophylla include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory infections and skin conditions.
